2026-05-10.title: VLM as Policy: Common-Law Content Moderation Framework for Short Video Platform
2026-05-10.authors: Xingyu Lu, Tianke Zhang, Chang Meng et al.
2026-05-10.method_en: KuaiMod frames content moderation as common-law case-based reasoning using a VLM. The VLM is trained via Chain-of-Thought (CoT) supervision to generate rationales before issuing verdicts (safe/violating/borderline). A two-stage curriculum trains the classifier first, then end-to-end CoT generation. An online feedback loop with user reports and reviewer corrections enables continuous policy update.
2026-05-10.method_zh: KuaiMod 将内容审核类比为「普通法判例推理」，以 VLM 为核心，通过 CoT 监督训练模型先生成推理链再做裁决。两阶段课程训练（分类预热→CoT 端到端），在线反馈闭环实现策略持续演化。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: First to apply Common-Law case-based reasoning paradigm to content moderation. VLM acts as a living policy executor rather than a static classifier. Online feedback loop enables dynamic policy evolution without full retraining.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 首次将「普通法判例推理」范式引入内容审核；VLM 作为活策略执行者；在线反馈闭环无需全量重训即可更新策略。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: Static classifiers cannot keep up with evolving violation types and new platform policies → We train a VLM with CoT reasoning to dynamically apply policy as case-based judgment (KuaiMod), achieving -20% user reporting rate in production.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 静态分类器无法跟上新型违规和政策更新 → 训练 VLM 以 CoT 推理动态执行策略（KuaiMod），生产部署后用户举报率下降 20%。

2026-05-10.title: Dynamic Content Moderation in Livestreams: Combining Supervised Classification with MLLM-Boosted Similarity Matching
2026-05-10.authors: Wei Chee Yew, Hailun Xu, Sanjay Saha, Xiaotian Fan et al.
2026-05-10.method_en: Dual-path hybrid system: supervised multiclass classification for known violations, MLLM-boosted similarity matching for novel/ambiguous cases. Both paths process text, audio, and visual modalities. MLLM knowledge distillation transfers large-model reasoning into lightweight routing components. Deployed at production scale on a major live-streaming platform.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 双路径混合系统：监督分类路径检测已知违规，MLLM 增强相似度匹配路径处理新型模糊违规；两路并行取高置信度裁决；MLLM 知识蒸馏保证实时性。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: Dual-path architecture uniquely combines precision (classifier) with flexibility (similarity retrieval). MLLM distillation enables large-model reasoning at production latency. First system to address simultaneous text/audio/video moderation in livestreams at scale.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 双路互补兼顾精度与泛化；MLLM 蒸馏实现大模型推理能力轻量化；首个生产规模直播多模态审核系统。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: Single classifiers miss novel violations; similarity-only systems have poor precision → Dual-path hybrid with MLLM distillation achieves 67-76% recall at 80% precision across both paths, deployed on millions of hours of live content.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 单一分类器漏检新型违规；纯相似度系统精度低 → 双路混合+MLLM蒸馏，在百万小时直播内容上实现 67-76% 召回率（精度 80%）。

2026-05-10.title: AFMRL: Attribute-Enhanced Fine-Grained Multi-Modal Representation Learning in E-commerce
2026-05-10.authors: Biao Zhang, Lixin Chen, Bin Zhang, Zongwei Wang, Tong Liu, Bo Zheng
2026-05-10.method_en: AFMRL defines e-commerce fine-grained understanding as attribute generation. (1) MLLM extracts key product attributes (color, material, style) from image+text. (2) Attribute-Guided Contrastive Learning (AGCL) mines hard negatives anchored on attributes. (3) Retrieval-aware Attribute Reinforcement (RAR) uses RL feedback from retrieval quality to dynamically adjust attribute attention weights.
2026-05-10.method_zh: AFMRL 将细粒度电商理解定义为属性生成任务：MLLM 提取属性→AGCL 属性引导难负例对比学习→RAR 检索感知属性强化（RL），三阶段闭环。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: Novel combination of generative MLLM attribute extraction with discriminative contrastive learning + RL in a unified pipeline. Breaks through the fine-grained retrieval bottleneck of general-purpose VLMs (e.g., VLM2Vec) in e-commerce.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 将生成式 MLLM 属性提取与判别式对比学习+RL 结合，属性作为语义锚点突破通用 VLM 细粒度瓶颈。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: General VLMs (VLM2Vec) are dominated by irrelevant visual features (logo, background) and miss fine-grained product attributes → AFMRL uses MLLM-generated attributes as anchors for contrastive learning and RL, achieving SOTA on multiple e-commerce retrieval tasks at Alibaba scale.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 通用 VLM 被无关视觉噪声主导，细粒度属性差异被淡化 → AFMRL 以 MLLM 属性为锚点做对比学习+RL，多任务电商检索 SOTA。

2026-05-10.title: Adapting Vision-Language Models for E-commerce Understanding at Scale
2026-05-10.authors: Matteo Nulli, Vladimir Orshulevich, Tala Bazazo, et al. (12 authors)
2026-05-10.method_en: Large-scale experimental study of VLM adaptation strategies for e-commerce. Proposes a novel 3-dimensional evaluation suite: (1) deep product understanding, (2) strict instruction following, (3) dynamic attribute extraction. Systematically ablates multi-image fusion, attribute-centric instruction formats, and noise-robust training.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 大规模实验研究 VLM 适配电商场景的最佳实践，提出三维评估套件（深度商品理解、指令跟随、动态属性提取），系统消融多图融合、属性指令格式、噪声鲁棒训练。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: First systematic methodology study for adapting general VLMs to e-commerce. 3D evaluation suite provides a standard benchmark for the field. Shows targeted adaptation preserves general capability while substantially improving e-commerce performance.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 首个系统性电商 VLM 适配方法论研究；三维评估套件标准化电商 VLM 评测；证明有针对性适配可在保持通用能力的同时大幅提升电商性能。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: No documented strategy exists for adapting general-purpose VLMs to the multi-image, attribute-centric, noisy e-commerce domain → Large-scale experimental study derives best practices, with a new evaluation suite as community standard.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 无系统性 VLM 适配电商的最佳实践 → 大规模实验提炼方法论，三维评估套件作为社区标准。

2026-05-10.title: OpenSearch-VL: An Open Recipe for Frontier Multimodal Search Agents
2026-05-10.method_en: OpenSearch-VL provides a complete open recipe for training frontier multimodal search agents: (1) High-quality data curation via Wikipedia path sampling + fuzzy entity rewriting + visual grounding. (2) Diverse tool environment: text search, image search, OCR, cropping, sharpening, super-resolution, perspective correction. (3) Fatal-Aware GRPO: masks post-failure tokens, preserves pre-failure reasoning via one-sided advantage clamping.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 开源完整多模态搜索 Agent 配方：高质量数据策划（维基路径+模糊改写+视觉定位）、7 类工具环境、Fatal-Aware GRPO（工具失败 token mask+单边优势截断）。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: First fully open multimodal deep-search agent recipe. Fatal-Aware GRPO elegantly handles tool failure cascade in RL training. 10+ point improvement across 7 benchmarks; matches commercial models on BrowseComp-Plus.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 首个完整开源多模态深度搜索 Agent 配方；Fatal-Aware GRPO 优雅处理工具失败级联；7 项基准+10分；与商业模型持平。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: Existing multimodal search agents suffer from data shortcuts, limited tool sets, and naive RL that collapses on tool failures → OpenSearch-VL's open recipe with Fatal-Aware GRPO achieves +10pts average on 7 benchmarks.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 现有搜索 Agent 数据有捷径、工具集单一、RL 对工具失败处理粗暴 → OpenSearch-VL Fatal-Aware GRPO 7 项基准+10pts。

2026-05-10.title: Lightweight Stylistic Consistency Profiling: Robust Detection of LLM-Generated Textual Content for Multimedia Moderation
2026-05-10.authors: Siyuan Li, Aodu Wulianghai, Xi Lin, Xibin Yuan, Qinghua Mao, Guangyan Li, Xiang Chen, Jun Wu, Jianhua Li
2026-05-10.method_en: LiSCP builds a stylistic consistency profile across multimodal-guided paraphrase variants: discrete stylistic features (syntax, punctuation distributions, POS patterns) + continuous semantic signals (embedding similarity) are computed across variants. A lightweight classifier detects LLM-generated text based on profile stability — human writing is consistently styled; LLM text shows characteristic consistency anomalies.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 跨改写变体构建文体一致性侧写：离散文体特征+连续语义信号，轻量分类头基于一致性剖面判断。人类写作风格稳定，LLM 生成文本在特定维度表现出一致性异常。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: Shifts detection from surface text patterns to stylistic consistency fingerprints, achieving adversarial-paraphrase robustness where DetectGPT collapses to ~55% AUROC. Lightweight design suitable for large-scale content platforms.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 从表面文字转向风格一致性指纹，对抗改写场景下 DetectGPT 退化至~55% AUROC，LiSCP 保持稳定；轻量适合大规模内容平台。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: LLM-generated text detectors (DetectGPT, Binoculars) collapse to near-random under adversarial paraphrasing → LiSCP detects consistency fingerprints across paraphrase variants, achieving robust detection for multimedia moderation.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 现有检测器在对抗改写下退化至近随机 → LiSCP 检测跨变体一致性指纹，对多媒体审核实现鲁棒检测。

2026-05-10.title: Uni-OPD: Unifying On-Policy Distillation with a Dual-Perspective Recipe
2026-05-10.method_en: Uni-OPD identifies two OPD bottlenecks: insufficient student exploration and unreliable teacher supervision. Student-side: dual data balancing strategies (difficulty curriculum + class balance) for exploration. Teacher-side: Outcome-Guided Margin Calibration (OGMC) restores order-consistency between correct and incorrect trajectories, filtering unreliable supervision signals. Unified framework covers LLMs, MLLMs, single/multi-teacher, strong-to-weak, and cross-modal distillation.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 识别 OPD 双瓶颈：学生探索不足+教师监督不可靠。学生端：双平衡策略；教师端：OGMC 恢复序一致性。统一覆盖 LLM/MLLM/单教师/多教师/跨模态。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: OGMC is a novel mechanism restoring teacher supervision reliability via outcome-guided order consistency. First unified OPD framework for both LLMs and MLLMs with cross-modal support.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: OGMC 基于结果引导恢复教师监督可靠性，首个统一 LLM/MLLM OPD 框架，支持跨模态蒸馏。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: OPD for LLMs is effective but fails in MLLMs due to unreliable teacher supervision and insufficient student exploration → Uni-OPD's dual-perspective recipe addresses both, verified on 5 domains, 16 benchmarks.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: OPD 在 LLM 有效但迁移到 MLLM 受教师可靠性和探索不足制约 → Uni-OPD 双视角配方，5 领域 16 基准验证。

2026-05-10.title: Multimodal Data Curation Through Ranked Retrieval
2026-05-10.authors: Pratyush Muthukumar, Harshil Kotamreddy, Sarah Amiraslani et al.
2026-05-10.method_en: Two-component framework: (1) Symmetric Nucleus Subsampling (SNS) trims noisy image-text pairs by retaining mutual support subsets. (2) Expert Embedding Engine (EEE) fuses complementary embedding experts via learned projection with a bias-aware objective that reduces modality-driven separation in the shared embedding space.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 双组件：SNS 通过保留相互支持子集修剪噪声图文对；EEE 学习投影层融合多专家 embedding，偏差感知目标减少模态驱动分离。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: Dual-level repair of multimodal embedding space: training pair denoising (SNS) + expert fusion (EEE). Both sides of the alignment problem addressed simultaneously.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 双层修复：训练对去噪（SNS）+专家融合（EEE），同时解决对齐问题的两个层面。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: Shared embedding spaces cluster by modality rather than meaning, degrading cross-modal retrieval and data curation → SNS + EEE fix both the training pairs and the embedding model, improving alignment.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: Embedding 空间按模态聚类而非语义，跨模态检索失真 → SNS+EEE 同时修复训练对和 embedding 模型，改善对齐。

2026-05-10.title: EGAD: Entropy-Guided Adaptive Distillation for Token-Level Knowledge Transfer
2026-05-10.authors: Hao Zhang, Zhibin Zhang, Guangxin Wu, Wanyi Ning, Jiafeng Guo, Xueqi Cheng
2026-05-10.affiliation: Institute of Computing Technology, Chinese Academy of Sciences (ICT, CAS)
2026-05-10.method_en: EGAD uses teacher output entropy as a token-level difficulty signal: (1) Token-level curriculum progressively shifts focus from low- to high-entropy tokens during training. (2) Adaptive loss weighting scales distillation loss proportionally to token entropy. (3) Fine-grained distribution alignment focuses on high-entropy critical decision points.
2026-05-10.method_zh: 用教师输出熵作为 token 难度信号：由易到难的 token 课程→自适应损失权重→高熵 token 细粒度分布对齐。
2026-05-10.innovation_en: Entropy-based token difficulty for distillation curriculum is intuitive and effective. Shifts focus from uniform token treatment to importance-weighted knowledge transfer.
2026-05-10.innovation_zh: 熵驱动 token 课程直觉清晰；从等权处理转向重要性加权知识迁移。
2026-05-10.story_arc_en: Existing distillation methods treat all tokens equally, wasting capacity on trivial tokens and under-learning critical decision points → EGAD's entropy-guided adaptive strategy concentrates learning on high-entropy tokens, improving efficiency and quality.
2026-05-10.story_arc_zh: 现有蒸馏等权处理 token，关键决策点学习不足 → EGAD 熵引导自适应策略集中学习高熵 token。
